description: Replace colored dot indicators next to individual reminder times with functional checkboxes that call confirmMedicationIntake when checked, with strikethrough styling for confirmed times.
steps: Add a handler function that wraps confirmMedicationIntake in startTransition, taking medicationId, medicationName, and scheduledTime as parameters

In the inner reminder_times.map() loop, replace the colored dot <span> element with an <input type='checkbox'> element. The checkbox should: be checked when isTaken is true, call the handler with (med.id, med.name, time) on change, be disabled when isPending, and use appropriate Tailwind classes for styling consistent with the main checkbox
Keep the existing strikethrough text styling that is already applied when isTaken is true
Add an appropriate aria-label to each time checkbox for accessibility, e.g. 'Mark {med.name} at {time} as taken'
Ensure the checkbox uses semantic HTML (input element with proper label association) and responsive Tailwind classes
acceptance_criteria: Each individual reminder time has a checkbox instead of a colored dot
Checking a time checkbox calls confirmMedicationIntake with the correct medication ID, name, and scheduled time
Checked time checkboxes show the time text with strikethrough styling
Checkboxes are disabled during pending transitions
The main top-level checkbox per medication remains unchanged
npm run lint passes without errors
findings: Pre-existing lint errors in MedicationReminderAlert.tsx (react-hooks/set-state-in-effect and react-hooks/exhaustive-deps) - not caused by this change. Used bun for npm install and mise for node@22 setup since npm/node were not pre-installed. Created mise.toml in project root for node version management.
